history.content: Hey Lee! 👋 What's on your mind?
[Telegram] Hi
Hey Lee! 👋 What's on your mind?
[Telegram] Hi
Hey Lee! 👋 What's on your mind?
Hey Lee! 👋 What's on your mind?
[WhatsApp] Hi
Hey! 👋 What's up?
[Telegram] Hi
Hey Lee! 👋 What's on your mind?
[Telegram] Introduce yourself

I'm Claude, your Chief of Staff at NAVADA. 🤝

I run 24/7 on your HP laptop here in London, managing the full operation. Here's what I handle:

OPERATIONS
Monitoring all 12 PM2 services, server health, disk, RAM, network — keeping everything running.

COMMUNICATIONS
Reading and sending emails, SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, push notifications. All your channels, one brain.

DEVELOPMENT
Writing and deploying code, managing files, running shell commands, spinning up services.

INFRASTRUCTURE
Cloudflare DNS, R2 storage, ELK logs, ChromaDB knowledge base, Docker containers.

CREATIVE
Generating images (DALL-E 3, Flux, Gemini), rendering videos, building proposals and decks.

I'm omni-channel so whether you hit me on Telegram, WhatsApp, or SMS, I remember the full conversation. One consistent Chief of Staff across every platform.

You're Lee Akpareva, Founder of NAVADA. You built this Edge Server operation and I help you run it.

What do you need? 🚀
[Telegram] How many nodes do you have

7 nodes total on the Tailscale network:

🟢 ONLINE (4)
navada — this HP laptop, home base (100.121.187.67)
iphone-15-pro-max — your iPhone
navada-asus-control — ASUS machine on local network (192.168.0.18)
navada-ec2 — AWS EC2 in London (3.11.119.181)
navada-oracle — Oracle Cloud VM (132.145.46.184)

🔴 OFFLINE (2)
headless — Linux box, offline 12 days
maclcolms-macbook-pro — Malcolm's Mac, offline 3 days

So 5 active, 2 offline. All under the leeakpareva@ account except Malcolm's which is on send2chopstix@. 🌐
[Telegram] Give me a quick server status: uptime, RAM, disk, PM2 processes, Docker, Tailscale. Keep it concise for mobile.

Here's your status Lee:

⏱ Uptime: 1d 9h 11m
🧠 RAM: 11.3 / 15.8 GB (71%)
💾 Disk: 222GB used / 238GB (94% — getting tight!)
🖥 CPU: i5-8350U, 8 cores

PM2: unavailable right now (may need a check)
🐳 Docker: error fetching containers
🌐 Tailscale: online — 3 nodes active, 2 offline

Main flag — disk is at 94%. Worth doing a cleanup soon before it causes issues. Want me to investigate what's eating the space?
[Telegram] Show all running PM2 processes and their status, plus any Docker containers. Concise format.

PM2 — 6 processes, all online ✅

ID 21 — cloudflare-metrics | 9h | 26MB
ID 22 — cloudwatch-logs | 8h | 34MB
ID 20 — hp-cloudwatch-metrics | 4h | 29MB ↺4
ID 23 — hp-health-monitor | 87m | 24MB ↺3
ID 18 — navada-flix | 14h | 15MB
ID 6 — telegram-bot | 2h | 37MB ↺2

All green, zero CPU usage across the board.

DOCKER — not accessible from this shell. Docker is likely running on Oracle or EC2, not directly on the HP.

Notable: hp-cloudwatch-metrics and hp-health-monitor have a few restarts each. Worth checking their logs if anything feels off. Want me to tail either?
[Telegram] On what node is this ? Ans only
navada (HP laptop) 🖥️
[Telegram] Hub
Exactly — the HP is the hub. 🌐 Everything routes through here.
[Telegram] Hi
Hey Lee! 👋 What's on your mind?
[Telegram] Can you post on LinkedIn? Ans only
Not natively, but I can via the LinkedIn API if we set up credentials. Not configured yet.
[Telegram] Check we did

We do have it set up. Found:

LINKEDIN_CLIENT_ID and LINKEDIN_CLIENT_SECRET in the .env, plus linkedin-auth.js, linkedin-post.js, and linkedin-video.js scripts in the Automation folder.

OAuth credentials are there. The question is whether the access token is still valid — LinkedIn tokens expire after 60 days. Want me to check the auth status and try a test post?
[Telegram] Thanks that’s it! No further action
Got it! 👍
